manufacturing_process: Stamped bracket welded to underbody reinforcement
primary_function: Transfer battery pack mounting loads into the underbody structure
interfaces: Battery pack mount, underbody rail, floor reinforcement, fastener stack
load_cases: Battery mass load, road durability, curb strike, service load, body torsion
environmental_exposure: Severe underbody corrosion, road splash, stone impact, salt exposure
known_design_concerns: Bracket fatigue, fastener pull-out, corrosion, spot weld fatigue, dimensional mismatch, serviceability
assumptions: Synthetic demo data only. Final values require engineering review.
